title: focalpoint-null purpose undocumented -- add purpose doc or decide archive
description: agents/focalpoint-null/ contains Start-FocalPoint.ps1 and Chat-FocalPoint.ps1 but has no README, no entry in MODULE-FUNCTION-INDEX.md, and no cross-reference in agentic-manifest.json. The name 'focalpoint-null' is unclear. Either: (a) add a README.md to the agent folder documenting its purpose, inputs, outputs, and relationship to other agents, or (b) determine it is abandoned and archive to ~DOWNLOADS/archive/. Check git log / OrphanAudit for last meaningful change before deciding.
notes: Appears in Checklists Scripts tab as 'Agent' type files but purpose is not documented anywhere in ~README.md/ docs.
